source_jobs.title: Communications
source_jobs.description: <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">CEO's Communications department elevates CEO's mission, program model, impact, campaigns, and values at local and national levels. This team builds CEO's branding, provides marketing materials, leads external communications efforts, and aligns the organization's messaging framework. </span></p>

source_jobs.title: Director, Policy and Business Development
Direct Services
source_jobs.description: <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">CEO’s Direct Services department works directly with program participants through the facilitation of CEO’s evidence based program model that includes case management, job coaching &amp; mentoring, transitional employment, job placement &amp; retention services.</span></p>

source_jobs.title: Employee Experience
source_jobs.description: <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">CEO’s Employee Experience department is tasked with maximizing employee productivity and protecting the company from any issues that may arise within the workforce. HR responsibilities include compensation and benefits, recruitment, retention, DEI initiatives, and talent development.</span></p>

source_jobs.title: Employment Specialist
Executive Operations
source_jobs.description: <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">CEO’s Executive Operations team functions as the "Office of the CEO and Executive Team." The team provides administrative support for the Executive Team and leads organization-wide strategies. As CEO continues to grow, the Executive Operations team supports various organizational culture initiatives, including internal communications strategies.</span></p>

source_jobs.title: Finance
source_jobs.description: <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">CEO’s Finance department is dedicated to achieve the organization’s mission through overseeing fiscal operations such as providing proper oversight of all expenditures and revenue collections and delivering timely and accurate financial reporting. The Finance department comprises several units: Accounting, Budget, Grants, Payroll, and Risk Management.</span></p>

source_jobs.title: Full-Time Work Crew Supervisor
Full-Time Work Crew Supervisor
Full-Time Work Crew Supervisor
Fund Development
source_jobs.description: <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">CEO's Fund Development team is responsible for securing philanthropic revenue in support of our mission. This team raises funds through a combination of institutional, individual, corporate, and government sources.</span><strong> </strong></p>

source_jobs.title: IT
source_jobs.description: <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">CEO’s IT department </span><span style="font-weight: 400;">is charged with establishing, monitoring and maintaining information technology systems and services.&nbsp; IT roles can include computer programming, network administration, computer engineering, web development, and technical support.</span></p>

source_jobs.title: Job Developer
Legal
source_jobs.description: <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">CEO’s Legal department </span><span style="font-weight: 400;">provides counseling on all legal, ethical, and corporate governance matters, is responsible for managing all legal disputes and complaints, and reviews policies and procedures for compliance with applicable law.</span></p>

source_jobs.title: Policy
source_jobs.description: <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">CEO’s Policy department leads the organization’s efforts to engage government officials across our states with the goal of increasing government investment in reentry employment services, addressing collateral consequences for individuals returning from incarceration, and generating revenue for CEO.</span></p>

source_jobs.title: Program Admin/Support
source_jobs.description: <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">CEO’s Program Administration/Support department&nbsp; strives to support the effective &amp; impactful delivery of CEO’s core model across our sites. This team serves as a collaborative, solution-oriented support system for Program Delivery to help elevate best practices, address challenges, and ensure high-quality programs across CEO’s sites.</span></p>

source_jobs.title: Sales
source_jobs.description: <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">CEO’s Sales department </span><span style="font-weight: 400;">&nbsp;leads the organization’s work to secure transitional work crew opportunities. This involves bringing on additional customers in new and diverse industries, as well as deepening our current relationships with partners to support a sustainable social enterprise.</span></p>

notes: Non-profit organization with a focus on employment opportunities and reentry services.
